Done. Here is the summary:

**Problem:** Server-side player tile collision was disabled in `game-loop.ts` because a stale comment claimed the server used different tile dimensions (25x19 @ 32px) than the client (50x35 @ 20px). In reality, `map.ts` already had the correct matching dimensions (`CHUNK_TILES_W=50`, `CHUNK_TILES_H=35`, `TILE_SIZE=20`). The `isPixelWalkable` import had been removed and `validateAndApplyMove` accepted any position without checking walkability.
